zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡Solana/美元技术分析：明显收缩，市场处于方向选择前的整理阶段。
zh.content:
短线偏弱震荡从技术指标看，MACD数值为-0.4568

从价格表现看，SOL/USD，处于零轴下方，反映空头动能仍占据优势。不过跌幅有限且价格未出现快速下最新报64.2，位于日挫，说明卖压有所减弱。RSI数据内区间64.1至64.47附近，24小时微暂缺，需结合后续成交量变化确认动跌0.39%。整体波动收能方向。

关键支撑位关注64.10美元，若跌破窄，显示市场观望情绪较该位置，可能进一步测试63.50美元附近；上方首浓，短线维持偏弱震荡格局要阻力位位于20日均线64.74美元，其后关注。

均线方面，现价低65.50美元区域。只有有效站稳均线，短于SMA(20)的64.7415，说明短期趋势仍线反弹空间才有望打开。

交易策略受压制。MACD值为-0.4568方面，激进交易者可关注64.10美元附近的支撑且处于零轴下方，表现，出现企稳信号后尝试轻仓布局；稳健投资者则建议等待价格重新突破并站稳64.74美元反映空头动能略占优势，不过后跟进。若跌破支撑位，应下行动力暂未明显扩大严格设置止损，防范空头延续风险。。

关键位置方面，64.1构成首个短线支撑，若失守则可能测试63.5附近区域；上方阻力首先关注64.75，其次关注65.5一线。只有有效站稳均线，反弹空间才有望进一步打开。

交易策略上，激进投资者可关注支撑位附近的低吸机会，并严格设置止损；稳健投资者宜等待价格重新突破并站稳64.75后再考虑跟进。当前阶段以控制仓位、顺势交易为主。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is trading at 64.2, slightly below its 20-period simple moving average of 64.74, indicating a mildly bearish short-term bias. The 24-hour decline of 0.39% is modest, but the inability to reclaim the SMA suggests that buyers are not yet in full control. Price action remains compressed within the session range of 64.10 to 64.47, reflecting indecision and a lack of strong directional momentum.

Momentum indicators also lean cautiously negative. The MACD reading of -0.4568 points to bearish momentum persisting beneath the surface, although the absence of a signal-line value limits confirmation of trend strength. With RSI data unavailable, momentum assessment relies primarily on price structure and MACD behavior. As long as SOL remains below the 20-period average, rallies may face selling pressure, particularly near recent intraday highs.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located around 64.10, the session low and current floor for short-term traders. A break below this level could expose the market to additional downside toward the psychological 63.50 area. On the upside, resistance is seen near 64.47, followed by the SMA region around 64.74. A sustained move above these levels would improve sentiment and increase the likelihood of a broader recovery phase.

Traders may consider a cautious approach while price remains trapped between support and resistance. Aggressive participants could look for short-term buying opportunities only if SOL holds above 64.10 and shows renewed strength above 64.47. More conservative traders may prefer waiting for a decisive breakout above the moving average before establishing long positions. Conversely, a confirmed break below support would favor defensive positioning and could signal further near-term weakness.
